properties.name: rag.vector.type
properties.description: Vector store implementation: pg or milvus.

properties.name: rag.memory.hybrid-enabled
properties.description: Whether conversation memory compression should use recent/protected/summarizable hybrid planning.

properties.name: rag.memory.recent-keep-messages
properties.description: Number of newest messages kept out of each compression candidate window.

properties.name: rag.memory.important-message-threshold
properties.description: Minimum deterministic importance score required to protect a non-recent message from summarization.

properties.name: rag.memory.summary-max-source-messages
properties.description: Maximum low-importance source messages sent into one summary generation request.

properties.name: rag.memory.token-trigger-threshold
properties.description: Approximate future token threshold for triggering memory compaction.

properties.name: rag.memory.stage-switch-trigger-enabled
properties.description: Whether memory compaction can be triggered by an explicit conversation or agent stage switch.

properties.name: rag.memory.recovery-trigger-enabled
properties.description: Whether memory compaction can be triggered after a session recovery event.

properties.name: career.render.font.enabled
properties.description: Whether resume export should register governed fonts for PDF rendering.

properties.name: career.render.font.pdf-family
properties.description: Font family name used when registering PDF fonts.

properties.name: career.render.font.fail-on-missing-fonts
properties.description: Fail PDF rendering when no configured font resource can be loaded.

properties.name: career.render.font.css-families
properties.description: CSS font-family stack emitted into rendered resume HTML.

properties.name: career.render.font.paths
properties.description: Ordered classpath: or file: font resources used by openhtmltopdf.

properties.name: career.tts.enabled
properties.description: Whether long-text TTS planning is enabled for interview questions, follow-ups, and feedback.

properties.name: career.tts.chunk-max-chars
properties.description: Maximum characters per planned TTS chunk.

properties.name: career.tts.voice
properties.description: Logical voice name used by downstream TTS playback integrations.

properties.name: career.tts.cache-ttl-seconds
properties.description: TTL for cached TTS artifacts when an implementation stores audio chunks.

properties.name: career.tts.provider
properties.description: Logical TTS provider name. Use none for planning only or xunfei for long-text synthesis.

properties.name: career.tts.xunfei.enabled
properties.description: Whether the Xunfei long-text TTS HTTP provider is enabled.

properties.name: career.tts.xunfei.app-id
properties.description: Xunfei long-text TTS app id.

properties.name: career.tts.xunfei.api-key
properties.description: Xunfei long-text TTS API key.

properties.name: career.tts.xunfei.api-secret
properties.description: Xunfei long-text TTS API secret.

properties.name: career.tts.xunfei.host
properties.description: Xunfei long-text TTS API host.

properties.name: career.tts.xunfei.endpoint-base-url
properties.description: Optional full base URL override for Xunfei long-text TTS, mainly for private gateways or tests.

properties.name: career.tts.xunfei.create-path
properties.description: Xunfei long-text TTS task creation path.

properties.name: career.tts.xunfei.query-path
properties.description: Xunfei long-text TTS task query path.

properties.name: career.tts.xunfei.audio-encoding
properties.description: Audio encoding requested from Xunfei long-text TTS.

properties.name: career.tts.xunfei.timeout-seconds
properties.description: Maximum seconds to wait for a Xunfei long-text TTS task.

properties.name: career.tts.xunfei.poll-interval-millis
properties.description: Polling interval for Xunfei long-text TTS task status.

properties.name: career.tts.xunfei.max-polls
properties.description: Maximum polling attempts for Xunfei long-text TTS task status.

properties.name: career.tts.xunfei.max-text-chars
properties.description: Maximum text length accepted by the Xunfei TTS provider.

properties.name: career.demeanor.enabled
properties.description: Whether optional demeanor and expression auxiliary analysis is enabled.

properties.name: career.demeanor.provider
properties.description: Logical demeanor provider name. Use none for observation-only aggregation or xingchen for workflow analysis.

properties.name: career.demeanor.retention-policy
properties.description: Retention policy for derived demeanor analysis summaries.

properties.name: career.demeanor.limitations
properties.description: Limitations shown with demeanor analysis, including consent and auxiliary-signal boundaries.

properties.name: career.demeanor.xingchen.enabled
properties.description: Whether the Xunfei XingChen demeanor workflow provider is enabled.

properties.name: career.demeanor.xingchen.api-key
properties.description: Xunfei XingChen workflow API key.

properties.name: career.demeanor.xingchen.api-secret
properties.description: Xunfei XingChen workflow API secret.

properties.name: career.demeanor.xingchen.flow-id
properties.description: Xunfei XingChen workflow id for demeanor and expression analysis.

properties.name: career.demeanor.xingchen.chat-url
properties.description: Xunfei XingChen workflow chat completion endpoint.

properties.name: career.demeanor.xingchen.upload-url
properties.description: Xunfei XingChen workflow file upload endpoint used for Base64 image input.

properties.name: career.demeanor.xingchen.timeout-seconds
properties.description: Maximum seconds for XingChen demeanor workflow requests.

properties.name: career.demeanor.xingchen.max-image-bytes
properties.description: Maximum decoded image size accepted for XingChen demeanor uploads.

properties.name: career.crawler.webmagic.enabled
properties.description: Whether WebMagic job posting URL import is enabled.

properties.name: career.resume.ocr.max-pdf-pages
properties.description: Maximum PDF pages rendered to images for resume OCR fallback.

properties.name: core.crawler.webmagic.enabled
properties.description: Whether the generic WebMagic crawler agent is enabled for knowledge URL imports.

properties.name: core.crawler.webmagic.respect-robots-txt
properties.description: Whether generic WebMagic crawler requests should mark robots-aware crawling policy.

properties.name: core.crawler.webmagic.max-text-length
properties.description: Maximum readable text characters kept from a crawled web page.

properties.name: core.crawler.webmagic.min-host-interval-millis
properties.description: Minimum interval between generic crawler requests for the same host.

properties.name: core.crawler.webmagic.user-agent
properties.description: User-Agent used by the generic WebMagic crawler agent.

properties.name: career.xunfei.ocr.enabled
properties.description: Whether the Xunfei OCR HTTP provider is enabled.

properties.name: career.xunfei.ocr.endpoint-base-url
properties.description: Optional base URL override for Xunfei OCR, mainly for private gateways or tests.

properties.name: career.xunfei.ocr.path
properties.description: Xunfei OCR request path.

properties.name: career.xunfei.ocr.max-image-bytes
properties.description: Maximum image size accepted by the Xunfei OCR provider.

properties.name: career.xunfei.face-detect.enabled
properties.description: Whether the Xunfei face detection HTTP provider is enabled.

properties.name: career.xunfei.face-detect.endpoint-base-url
properties.description: Optional base URL override for Xunfei face detection.

properties.name: career.xunfei.face-detect.path
properties.description: Xunfei face detection request path.

properties.name: career.xunfei.face-detect.max-image-bytes
properties.description: Maximum image size accepted by the Xunfei face detection provider.

properties.name: career.xunfei.nlp.enabled
properties.description: Whether the Xunfei NLP HTTP provider is enabled.

properties.name: career.xunfei.nlp.endpoint-base-url
properties.description: Optional base URL override for Xunfei NLP.

properties.name: career.xunfei.nlp.path
properties.description: Xunfei NLP request path.

properties.name: career.xunfei.nlp.max-text-chars
properties.description: Maximum text length accepted by the Xunfei NLP provider.

properties.name: career.voice.xunfei-iat.enabled
properties.description: Whether the Xunfei Spark IAT file transcription agent is enabled.

properties.name: career.voice.xunfei-iat.app-id
properties.description: Xunfei Spark IAT app id.

properties.name: career.voice.xunfei-iat.api-key
properties.description: Xunfei Spark IAT API key.

properties.name: career.voice.xunfei-iat.api-secret
properties.description: Xunfei Spark IAT API secret.

properties.name: career.voice.xunfei-iat.endpoint-base-url
properties.description: Optional base URL override for Xunfei Spark IAT, mainly for private gateways or tests.

properties.name: career.voice.xunfei-iat.transcribe-path
properties.description: Xunfei Spark IAT transcription request path.

properties.name: career.voice.xunfei-iat.max-audio-bytes
properties.description: Maximum audio file size accepted by the file transcription agent.

properties.name: ragent.cache.bloom.enabled
properties.description: Whether the Redisson RBloomFilter cache penetration guard is enabled.

properties.name: ragent.datasource.dynamic.enabled
properties.description: Whether dynamic data source routing annotations and routing context should be enabled.

properties.name: ragent.datasource.dynamic.primary
properties.description: Default lookup key used by DynamicRoutingDataSource when no context data source is selected.

properties.name: ragent.datasource.dynamic.strict
properties.description: Reserved flag for rejecting unknown data source names when full dynamic registration is enabled.

properties.name: ragent.cache.bloom.name
properties.description: Redis bloom filter name used by the cache penetration guard.

properties.name: ragent.cache.bloom.expected-insertions
properties.description: Expected insertion count used when initializing RBloomFilter.

properties.name: ragent.cache.bloom.false-probability
properties.description: False positive probability used when initializing RBloomFilter.

properties.name: ragent.auth.sms.provider
properties.description: SMS verification sender provider. Use logging for local development or aliyun for Aliyun SMS.

properties.name: ragent.auth.sms.code-ttl
properties.description: How long a phone verification code remains valid.

properties.name: ragent.auth.sms.ticket-ttl
properties.description: How long a verified registration or password reset ticket remains valid.

properties.name: ragent.auth.sms.resend-cooldown
properties.description: Minimum interval before the same phone can request another SMS code.

properties.name: ragent.auth.sms.max-send-per-window
properties.description: Maximum SMS sends allowed for one phone during the send window.

properties.name: ragent.auth.sms.max-verify-failures
properties.description: Wrong code attempts allowed before invalidating the current code.

properties.name: ragent.auth.sms.aliyun.access-key-id
properties.description: Aliyun SMS access key id.

properties.name: ragent.auth.sms.aliyun.access-key-secret
properties.description: Aliyun SMS access key secret.

properties.name: ragent.auth.sms.aliyun.sign-name
properties.description: Aliyun SMS sign name.

properties.name: ragent.auth.sms.aliyun.template-code
properties.description: Aliyun SMS template code whose TemplateParam contains code.
